creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
See Also bugzilla field points to upstream issue which points to the fix.

(In reply to Vasil Dimov from comment #2)
> Btw, you tested monero 0.13.0.4, while the latest is 0.14.0.2.

I tested whatever was in ports at the time and master snapshot. Turns out I did have 0.14.0.2 error log as early as 2019-03-10. As bundled epee didn't change between 0.13.0.4 and 0.14.0.2 it's pointless to post excerpt here.
